== Notes for [[Item:Q89890|Q89890]] ==

ID: I84734

Name: Cornelia Negrina

Given Name: Cornelia

Surname: Negrina

Sex: F

_UID: 497256612097264ABFC1FC1E28A15CE63ED0

Change Date: 3 Oct 2005

Birth: ABT 150

Death: deceased

Father: Servius Cornelius Scipio Salvidienus b: ABT 123

Mother: Arria Sextia Paulina b: ABT 130

Marriage 1 Lucius Eggius Cornelius Marullus b: ABT 145

Married:

Children

Lucius Cornelius Cassonius Scipio b: ABT 170

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84734

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
